notes: Core mechanics (jumping, climbing, barrels, fireballs, hammer) are present but barrel physics/ladder transitions are buggy, girder layout doesn't match classic DK, and collision detection feels inconsistent making the game frustrating rather than fair.
A functional and bug-free implementation, but suffers from a major layout flaw where barrels roll the wrong way on the top girders, bypassing a large section of the level.

The build is mostly complete and recognizable with working movement, ladders, barrels, hazards, scoring, and states, but several gameplay-logic inaccuracies and rough edges keep it well short of a polished or faithful Donkey Kong recreation.
